user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter pending time off adjustments by status (Pending with me, Pending approval), so that I can focus on adjustments requiring my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Time Off Adjustments screen; When I select a status such as Pending with me; Then only adjustments in that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter adjustments by department and employee class, so that I can narrow the list to a specific group
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Time Off Adjustments screen; When I select a department and employee class and click Search; Then only matching adjustments are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to create a time off adjustment, so that I can correct an employee's leave balance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Time Off Adjustments screen; When I click Time off adjustment and enter the adjustment details; Then the adjustment is created and appears in the list

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view adjustment details including time off type, adjusted time off, balance and modified number of time offs, so that I can verify each adjustment before approving
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Time Off Adjustments screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows employee code, employee name, time off type, adjusted time off, balance time offs and modified number of time offs

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my search criteria and start over
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Pending Time Off Adjustments screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their default values
